# CWE-459: sensitive temp export is deleted after streaming completes.
lang: go
file: CWE-459-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"os"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"github.com/jmoiron/sqlx"
)

func ExportLedger(c *gin.Context, db *sqlx.DB) {
	f, err := os.CreateTemp("", "ledger-*.csv")
	if err != nil {
		c.String(http.StatusInternalServerError, "export failed")
		return
	}
	defer os.Remove(f.Name())
	defer f.Close()
	rows, _ := db.Queryx("SELECT account, balance FROM ledger")
	for rows.Next() {
		var account string
		var balance float64
		_ = rows.Scan(&account, &balance)
		_, _ = f.WriteString(account + "\n")
	}
	c.File(f.Name())
}
